title: EnvelopeRecipientTabs
description: Contains the tab collections for an envelope recipient, organized by tab type.

signHereTabs.description: Signature tabs requiring the recipient to sign.

initialHereTabs.description: Initial tabs requiring the recipient to initial.

dateSignedTabs.description: Date signed tabs auto-filled with the signing date.

textTabs.description: Text input tabs for free-form text entry.

fullNameTabs.description: Full name tabs auto-filled with the signer name.

emailTabs.description: Email tabs for email address input.

radioGroupTabs.description: Radio button group tabs for single-choice selection.

noteTabs.description: Note tabs for displaying read-only text.
